issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases, focusing only on happy path scenarios.

scenarios.name: Type-safe auth store with computed flags
scenarios.rationale: Baseline defaults to options-store; treatment uses the setup-store form with ref/computed and returns the full surface, matching the skill's recommended pattern.

scenarios.name: Destructure store state preserving reactivity
scenarios.rationale: Baseline likely uses plain destructure that breaks reactivity; treatment uses storeToRefs for state/getters and calls actions off the store instance per the skill.
